name: @ojagamez/oja-test-kit
description: Test framework for roblox-ts projects. Runs describe/it/expect inside Roblox Studio with structured JSON output.

scripts.build: rbxtsc --type package && mv out/init.luau out/index.luau && sed -i 's/TS.import(script, script,/TS.import(script, script.Parent,/g' out/index.luau

author: OjaGamez
